item.description:
What's new since your last update:

EasyDMG 2.1.1

This update keeps the Sparkle update/install window visible throughout the update flow.

  • Fixed an issue where the update progress or install panel could disappear behind other apps after clicking Install.

EasyDMG 2.1.0

This update focuses on smoother app replacements, clearer macOS permission handling, and a more reliable install flow.

  • Improved replacing apps in Applications with version comparison, clearer Replace messaging, and an option to automatically install newer versions.
  • Added guided handling for macOS App Management permission so EasyDMG can recover gracefully instead of failing mid-install.
  • EasyDMG now checks whether the app being replaced is running and helps quit it first, preventing stale launches after installation.
  • Install prompts now stay visible even if EasyDMG loses focus or macOS activates another app.
  • Added an option to open the installed app automatically after EasyDMG finishes.
  • Improved DMG cleanup/unmount reliability, progress window readability, and support links.

EasyDMG 2.0.0

This is the biggest EasyDMG update yet: a full settings redesign, deeper stability work, and smarter decisions when DMGs get weird.

  • Rebuilt the settings window with a more polished design, clearer setup flow, and stronger light/dark mode support.
  • Greatly improved fallback handling for installer-style DMGs, helper apps, multiple-app volumes, and unusual app bundles.
  • Hardened notifications, launch handling, and diagnostic logging so success, fallback, and error states are easier to trust and troubleshoot.
  • Expanded compatibility to macOS 13.0 and later.

EasyDMG 2.1.0

This update focuses on smoother app replacements, clearer macOS permission handling, and a more reliable install flow.

  • Improved replacing apps in Applications with version comparison, clearer Replace messaging, and an option to automatically install newer versions.
  • Added guided handling for macOS App Management permission so EasyDMG can recover gracefully instead of failing mid-install.
  • EasyDMG now checks whether the app being replaced is running and helps quit it first, preventing stale launches after installation.
  • Install prompts now stay visible even if EasyDMG loses focus or macOS activates another app.
  • Added an option to open the installed app automatically after EasyDMG finishes.
  • Improved DMG cleanup/unmount reliability, progress window readability, and support links.

EasyDMG 2.0.0

This is the biggest EasyDMG update yet: a full settings redesign, deeper stability work, and smarter decisions when DMGs get weird.

  • Rebuilt the settings window with a more polished design, clearer setup flow, and stronger light/dark mode support.
  • Greatly improved fallback handling for installer-style DMGs, helper apps, multiple-app volumes, and unusual app bundles.
  • Hardened notifications, launch handling, and diagnostic logging so success, fallback, and error states are easier to trust and troubleshoot.
  • Expanded compatibility to macOS 13.0 and later.
